column10: C2 beacon (tiny periodic flow): Very few packets, very short duration. Pattern matches known C2 check-in behaviour where malware sends a heartbeat every N seconds.
NULL scan: Flow with zero TCP flags set. No legitimate traffic uses null flags — used by scanners to identify OS type and open ports.
